violations.text: Menu is lacking an allergy statement. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know English Food Allergy Reactions Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024

Thermometer is lacking in the lowboy refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean on kitchen counters and napkin area. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024
Menu is lacking an allergy statement. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know English Food Allergy Reactions New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
Working containers (spray bottles) used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Utensils observed stored on an unclean surface (unclean drawer with debris) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in areas of the kitchen, service counter, and coffee bar. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2024

The areas beneath the hand sink and 3 bay sink, and ice bin/dipper well drain cupboard has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/07/2024
